metrics.note: v4: 3-year dataset (2022+2023+current, 26,931 rows vs 8,266 prior). PLUTO BBL join unlocks assess_per_unit, bldg_footprint (bldgfront×bldgdepth), numfloors, builtfar, lotdepth. Per-borough×class P97 caps preserve Manhattan (260 rows vs 106 prior). n_estimators=800, lr=0.04, max_depth=6. R²: 0.641→0.747 (+16.5%), MAE: $214k→$205k (-4%).
